% AUTO-GENERATED by books/visuals_style.py — do not edit by hand.
% Nature-journal figure system (NPG palette, sans-serif, thin axes).
% Regenerate: uv run python books/visuals_style.py --emit

\usepackage[table]{xcolor}
% Sans-serif in figures only (Nature labels); body text unchanged.
\usepackage{helvet}

\ifColor
  \definecolor{npg_blue}{RGB}{60,84,136}
  \definecolor{npg_green}{RGB}{0,160,135}
  \definecolor{npg_mint}{RGB}{145,209,194}
  \definecolor{npg_navy}{RGB}{44,62,80}
  \definecolor{npg_peach}{RGB}{252,238,228}
  \definecolor{npg_placeholder}{RGB}{250,250,250}
  \definecolor{npg_red}{RGB}{231,75,53}
  \definecolor{npg_sky}{RGB}{210,236,245}
  \definecolor{npg_table_head}{RGB}{245,247,250}
  \colorlet{visPrimary}{npg_blue}
  \colorlet{visSecondary}{npg_green}
  \colorlet{visAccent}{npg_red}
  \colorlet{visFillPrimary}{npg_sky}
  \colorlet{visFillSecondary}{npg_mint}
  \colorlet{visFillAccent}{npg_peach}
  \colorlet{visTableHead}{npg_table_head}
  \colorlet{visPlaceholderFill}{npg_placeholder}
  \colorlet{visAxis}{npg_navy}
  \colorlet{visText}{npg_navy}
\else
  \colorlet{visPrimary}{black!72}
  \colorlet{visSecondary}{black!50}
  \colorlet{visAccent}{black!35}
  \colorlet{visFillPrimary}{black!8}
  \colorlet{visFillSecondary}{black!14}
  \colorlet{visFillAccent}{black!6}
  \colorlet{visTableHead}{black!6}
  \colorlet{visPlaceholderFill}{black!4}
  \colorlet{visAxis}{black!55}
  \colorlet{visText}{black!80}
\fi

\tikzset{
  vis base/.style={
    font=\sffamily\footnotesize,
    text=visText,
    line cap=round,
    line join=round,
  },
  vis pipeline node/.style={
    vis base,
    draw=visPrimary,
    line width=0.6pt,
    fill=visFillPrimary,
    rounded corners=1.5pt,
    minimum width=2.2cm,
    minimum height=1.0cm,
    align=center,
    inner sep=3.5pt,
  },
  vis arch node/.style={
    vis pipeline node,
    fill=visFillSecondary,
    draw=visSecondary,
  },
  vis arrow/.style={
    ->,
    >=Stealth,
    line width=0.65pt,
    draw=visPrimary,
  },
  vis axis/.style={
    ->,
    >=Stealth,
    line width=0.55pt,
    draw=visAxis,
  },
  vis grid minor/.style={
    line width=0.5pt,
    draw=visAxis,
    opacity=0.25,
  },
  vis roof bandwidth/.style={
    line width=0.75pt,
    draw=visSecondary,
    dash pattern=on 3pt off 2pt,
  },
  vis roof compute/.style={
    line width=0.75pt,
    draw=visPrimary,
  },
  vis point a/.style={
    fill=visPrimary,
    draw=visPrimary,
    circle,
    inner sep=1.4pt,
  },
  vis point b/.style={
    fill=visSecondary,
    draw=visSecondary,
    circle,
    inner sep=1.4pt,
  },
  vis bar one/.style={
    fill=visFillPrimary,
    draw=visPrimary,
    line width=0.5pt,
  },
  vis bar two/.style={
    fill=visFillSecondary,
    draw=visSecondary,
    line width=0.5pt,
  },
  vis panel label/.style={
    font=\sffamily\bfseries\fontsize{9}{10}\selectfont,
    text=visText,
    anchor=north west,
    inner sep=0pt,
  },
  vis placeholder box/.style={
    vis base,
    draw=visAccent,
    line width=0.6pt,
    fill=visPlaceholderFill,
    rounded corners=1.5pt,
    inner sep=8pt,
  },
}

\newcommand{\visTableHeader}{%
  \rowcolor{visTableHead}%
}

\newcommand{\visPanelLabel}[1]{{\sffamily\bfseries #1}\quad}
